checks.detail: No explicit ≥16px font-size rule for input/select/textarea (browser default is smaller — iOS zooms on focus)
checks.fix_hint: input, select, textarea { font-size: 1rem; } per design-system.md Part E
Re-encode as webp ~80 quality at 1600w max per performance-2026.md Parts A/B
